message.content: Cloud Service Discovery involves adversaries enumerating cloud services on a system post-access. This technique spans across PaaS, IaaS, and SaaS environments, targeting services like CI/CD, Lambda Functions, and Azure AD. Adversaries use tools and APIs, such as Azure AD Graph API, Azure Resource Manager API, and open-source tools like Stormspotter and Pacu, to map out resources and services. They may also leverage AADInternals for Office 365 and Sharepoint, and ROADTools for Azure AD applications. The potential impact includes unauthorized access to sensitive data, lateral movement, and further exploitation of cloud resources. Mitigation strategies include implementing strict access controls, monitoring API usage, employing anomaly detection systems, and regularly auditing cloud service configurations to detect and respond to unauthorized enumeration activities.
